error_signature: scroll position tracking not working with symbols in ID
title: Scroll position tracking fails with symbols in ID
symptom: The scroll position tracking does not trigger as expected when IDs contain symbols or punctuation. Users see no data being captured from the scroll position.
applies_when: IDs of elements contain symbols or punctuation
root_cause: The scroll position tracking feature has a bug that prevents it from functioning correctly when element IDs contain symbols or punctuation. This leads to empty data being captured during scroll events.
fix_steps: Review the IDs of the elements involved in scroll tracking
Remove any symbols or punctuation from the IDs
Test the scroll position tracking again
agent_instruction: Ensure all element IDs used for scroll tracking are alphanumeric without symbols.
